weather.summary: Saturday: 12°C, broken clouds. Sunday: 13°C, clear sky

metadata.greeting: This weekend is looking fantastic for outdoor adventures! With clear skies on Sunday and only broken clouds on Saturday, it's a great time to explore. I've found some amazing local events and exciting days out perfect for a 3-year-old in Hackney.

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: A reading corner with a diverse book-pairing service.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, drop-in, and suitable for all ages, including toddlers. A good way to introduce your child to books.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Downs
transport.tip: Check term times before you go!

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: A museum designed specifically for children, with hands-on activities and exhibitions to encourage imagination, play, and design.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive galleries, soft play, and child-friendly exhibits make this perfect for a 3-year-old.

transport.tip: Check out the Mini Museum for under 2s

activities.title: Museum of London Docklands
activities.description: Discover the history of London's waterfront with interactive exhibits and hands-on activities. Don't miss the Mudlarks soft play area.
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed with children in mind, with activity sheets and hands-on exhibits. The Mudlarks soft play is a bonus.

transport.fromHackney: Jubilee Line to Canary Wharf, then DLR to West India Quay
transport.tip: Look out for the red signs explaining things in a child-friendly way.

activities.title: Hackney City Farm
activities.description: A small city farm with farm animals, a cafe, and fresh veggies.
activities.whyItWorks: A great way to see animals without a big entry fee. Toddlers love animals!

transport.tip: Check for special events on their website.

activities.title: The Very Hungry Caterpillar Trail
activities.description: Discover illustrated animals nestled amongst the blooming habitats of the reserve. Identify the letter on each one and complete the secret word in the activity booklet.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor exploration with a fun activity booklet, perfect for active toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Walthamstow Central, then a short walk.
transport.tip: Bring wellies if it's been raining!

activities.title: Big Fish Little Fish Family Rave
activities.description: Family rave in Hackney.
activities.whyItWorks: Fun and active, lets kids dance and enjoy music with their parents.

transport.tip: Book in advance, these events are popular!

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: Two floors of immersive play space known as the Story Worlds as well as the Story Garden playground. The museum hosts Baby Storytelling plus crafts and singalong time for babies and toddlers.
activities.whyItWorks: Immersive play space and garden

transport.tip: Check timetable for shows

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: A reading corner with a diverse book-pairing service.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, drop-in, and suitable for all ages, including toddlers. A good way to introduce your child to books.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Downs
transport.tip: Check term times before you go!

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore the natural world with dinosaur skeletons, fascinating exhibits, and interactive displays.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaurs! And plenty of space to wander. Free entry makes it an easy choice.

transport.fromHackney: District or Circle Line to South Kensington
transport.tip: Avoid weekends for a quieter experience.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Discover how the world works with interactive exhibits, space exploration galleries, and hands-on experiences.
activities.whyItWorks: Wonderlab offers hands-on experiments, and there are dedicated play areas for smaller children.

transport.fromHackney: District or Circle Line to South Kensington
transport.tip: The Garden in the basement is great for under 5s (open Tues-Sun).

activities.title: Cutty Sark Easter Egg Trail
activities.description: Take part in an Easter Egg Trail throughout the historic ship. Discover fascinating facts about Cutty Sark's epic voyages, while you explore the decks — and keep your eyes peeled for the hidden eggs. Each egg has a letter on it — find them all and unscramble a secret nautical code. Head to the Cutty Sark café located beneath the hull to claim a free chocolatey treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Good outdoor activity

transport.tip: Check age range appropriate

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: A small zoo in the Hampstead Heath area, home to rare species of birds and animals, including wallabies and lemurs.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry and animals make this a great option for toddlers.

transport.tip: Combine with a picnic in Hampstead Heath.

activities.title: Hampton Court Palace Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt
activities.description: Embark on an Easter hunt, roaming through lush gardens, keeping your eyes peeled for elusive Lindt GOLD BUNNY statues peeking out from colourful daffodils.
activities.whyItWorks: Easter themed outdoor activity

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance

activities.title: British Library Story Explorers
activities.description: Programme is great for children and also free.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, and good for small child

transport.tip: Check website before travel

activities.title: Kew Gardens - Octonauts Adventure
activities.description: Explore Kew Gardens and take part in an Octonauts-themed adventure.
activities.whyItWorks: The combination of a beautiful garden and a popular children's show is a winner.

transport.fromHackney: Tube and Overground to Kew Gardens
transport.tip: Check the Kew Gardens website for specific dates and activities.

activities.title: Easter Egg-Stravaganza
activities.description: Hop into the magical world of Beatrix Potter with Royal Hospital for Neuro-disability's enchanting live show, egg hunt, easter bonnet parade, face painting, arts and crafts, café and plenty of delicious treats!
activities.whyItWorks: Live show

transport.tip: Book soon!

activities.title: Spring Family Fun at the Southbank Centre
activities.description: Enjoy family fun with amazing shows, dancing, puppetry and free events this Easter.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of variety, something for everyone.

transport.tip: Check the Southbank Centre website for a detailed schedule of events.

activities.title: Battersea Park Easter Activities
activities.description: Enjoy informal Easter egg hunts, picnics, or just a relaxing walk through this inner-city green space.
activities.whyItWorks: Pagoda views, picnic areas, child-friendly activities.

transport.tip: Check the Battersea Park website for a detailed schedule of events.

activities.title: Zoonormous Egg Hunt at London Zoo
activities.description: Wander past giraffes, lions, monkeys and more incredible wildlife as you search for hidden eggs on a special Easter egg hunt (included in zoo entry).
activities.whyItWorks: Animals and an easter egg hunt, two toddler favorites!

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance to save time.

activities.title: Gozzle Nature Trail
activities.description: Families can follow an interactive outdoor trail charting Gozzle's journey from her first nibble to her first splash – and eventually her first migration.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines a nature walk with a story.

transport.tip: Wear waterproof shoes!

activities.title: Easter Quest at Eltham Palace and Gardens
activities.price: Paid, in addition to paid admission
activities.description: Embark on a fun-filled adventure quest around the house and gardens. Follow the Easter trail, hunt for eggs and answer questions along the way to earn a delicious chocolate reward.
activities.whyItWorks: Good outdoor activity

transport.tip: Check train times

activities.title: Community Quilting: A Family Workshop at Garden Museum
activities.description: Free workshops aimed at families
activities.whyItWorks: Creative and fun

transport.tip: Check times and dates
